items.title: Depart from your city
items.description: Board the chartered coach at your pickup point. Music, snacks, good vibes.

items.title: Border crossing
items.description: Quick group processing at the Ambassador Bridge or Windsor Tunnel.

items.title: Hotel check-in
items.description: Drop your bags at the downtown hotel. Freshen up and get ready.

items.title: Group dinner
items.description: Optional group dinner at a downtown Windsor restaurant.

items.title: Nightclub — Venue 1
items.description: Skip the line with your NorthBound wristband. Welcome to Canadian nightlife.

items.title: Late checkout & explore
items.description: Sleep in, grab brunch, explore the riverfront or local shops.

items.title: Pre-game & dinner
items.description: Regroup with the crew. The evening out begins.

items.title: Nightclub — Venue 2 & 3
items.description: Saturday night is the main event. VIP entry, drink deals, guided nightlife crawl.

items.title: Late checkout
items.description: Pack up, grab coffee, say goodbye to Windsor.

items.title: Return transport
items.description: Board the coach home. Nap, swap stories, start planning the next trip.
